programs.title: Bondi Vet
programs.sub_title: Can This Cheetah Pass The Test?
programs.desc: A rescue kitten is struggling to walk since being microchipped and her family is worried it may have caused spinal damage. Will surgery restore Mitzi's ability to walk?

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Your Deceased Mother Would Be Ashamed of You!/Clueless Tenant?!
programs.desc: An elderly woman attempts to collect money from the family of a deceased friend for a cruise they had planned to go on; a man is asked to leave his home by his landlord, but he tells the Judge he thinks his landlord is breaking the law.

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.desc: Following an reported repossession, the vehicle was exchanged between the buyer and seller multiple times before a final payment settled the deal.

programs.title: CSI: New York
programs.desc: Stella discovers that her old friend, Professor Papakota, may be connected to the Greek antiquities smuggling ring and travels to Greece to investigate.

programs.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programs.desc: The CSIs investigate the killing of a man afflicted with Hypertrichosis, a.k.a. human werewolf syndrome.

programs.title: CSI: Miami
programs.desc: Three gunrunners are killed by a new high-tech weapon called The Vaporiser. After Horatio interviews the CEO of the defence contractor that made the weapon, he also turns up dead.
